---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

## Question
A clear and concise description of what you want to know.

## Context
Provide context for your question:
- What are you trying to achieve?
- What have you tried so far?
- What specific part of the project are you asking about?

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Java Version: [e.g. Java 17]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 91, Firefox 89, Safari 14]
- Screen Reader: [e.g. NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver]
- Application Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Accessibility Context
- Screen reader used: [e.g. NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver]
- Keyboard navigation: [e.g. Yes/No]
- Voice commands: [e.g. Yes/No]
- High contrast mode: [e.g. Yes/No]

## What I've Tried
Describe what you've already tried to solve this question:
1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

## Expected Answer
What kind of answer are you looking for?
- [ ] Code example
- [ ] Documentation reference
- [ ] Step-by-step instructions
- [ ] Explanation of concepts
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the question here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and documentation
- [ ] I have provided all the required information above
- [ ] I have clearly stated my question
- [ ] I have provided context for my question
- [ ] I have specified what kind of answer I'm looking for
